headline: DeFi Technologies Inc. Announces Extension of Proxy Voting Deadline for Upcoming Annual General and Special Meeting
summary: DeFi Technologies Inc. (the "Company" or "DeFi Technologies") (NASDAQ: DEFT) (CBOE CA: DEFI) (GR: R9B), a financial technology company bridging the gap between traditional capital markets and decentralized finance, announced today that it has extended the deadline for the submission of proxies related to its upcoming annual general and special meeting of shareholders (the "Meeting") to June 28, 2026 at 5:00 PM ET. The Meeting will be held virtually on June 29, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET at https://meet

headline: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Cut As Analysts Weigh Growth Risks
summary: The latest valuation update for Cboe Global Markets trims the fair value estimate from US$330.43 to US$319.64, a cut of about US$10.79 per share. This shift reflects a research backdrop where some analysts are focused on new retail and prediction market opportunities, while others emphasize competitive pressure from perpetual futures and softer volatility driven trading. Read on to see how this evolving narrative around Cboe Global Markets may shape expectations and what to watch as the story...

headline: After Plunging 28.2% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for CBOE (CBOE)
summary: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for CBOE (CBOE) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

headline: Cboe (CBOE) Launches Cboe Predicts With Retail Brokers Backing Binary Index Trades
summary: Cboe Global Markets launched "Cboe Predicts", a new regulated prediction markets suite focused on event based binary options. The first contracts are binary options linked to the Mini S&P 500 Index, offered through major retail brokers including Interactive Brokers and Charles Schwab. The rollout brings prediction style trading into Cboe's exchange infrastructure with an emphasis on education and risk controls for retail traders. Cboe Global Markets, ticker BATS:CBOE, is adding Cboe...
